topic: How a multi-branch operation manages payroll for four locations from one screen
format: Lead with a specific customer outcome — time saved, errors eliminated, hours recovered — then describe what changed
post:
A multi-branch business in Oman was running four separate payroll spreadsheets — one per location, dozens of WhatsApp threads, and a payroll manager drowning in reconciliation every month.

One platform change fixed all of it.

Before: payroll for each site lived in its own spreadsheet. HR spent days reconciling hours, chasing managers for approvals, manually calculating WPS transfers per branch — then holding their breath before the bank deadline.

After moving onto one platform, all four locations appeared on a single screen. WPS payroll ran with direct bank integration. SPF deductions calculated automatically. No spreadsheets. No branch-to-branch WhatsApp chains.

The payroll manager got back nearly a full working day every month.

SmartPro Hub was built for exactly this — Oman and GCC businesses running multi-site operations where fragmented tools keep creating problems. WPS payroll compliance, Ministry of Labour filings, Omanization tracking, bilingual Arabic and English. One place.

From OMR 25/month. 14-day free trial, no credit card needed.

If you're still stitching payroll together across locations by hand, the real cost isn't the hours lost. It's the errors sitting quietly in last month's run.

Book a 20-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=product-proof
